message:
feat(web): radical UI/UX redesign of the Complete Guide

- Stripped away 'Box-itis' by removing heavy card borders and adopting stark, Naked Typography layout

- Refactored the guide to use an asymmetrical 12-column Tufte grid, moving all TipBoxes, Prompts, and BlockQuotes into true Marginalia for an uninterrupted reading flow

- Adopted a severe Monochrome + One (Neon Orange #FF5500) color philosophy, eliminating the previous rainbow color scheme

- Replaced the intrusive left sidebar Table of Contents with a sleek Floating HUD component that tracks scroll progress and expands into a command palette

- Systematically upgraded the Interactive Visualizations (Flywheel, Convergence, Context Horizon, Agent Mail, etc.) with premium Framer Motion spring physics, neon glowing node links, and minimalist structural indicators
